name: Cherry Cheese Bars
recipeIngredient: Cream cheese (2 packages, 8 oz each, softened)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a 13x9x2-inch pan with butter-flavored Crisco. Set aside.
2. Coarsely chop walnut pieces for topping. Finely chop the remaining walnut pieces.
3. For crust: Combine flour and brown sugar in a bowl. Cut in butter-flavored Crisco until fine crumbs form. Add finely chopped nuts and coconut. Mix well. Remove 1/2 cup and set aside. Press remaining crumbs into the bottom of the pan. Bake at 350°F for 12 to 15 minutes, or until edges are lightly browned.
4. For filling: Beat cream cheese, granulated sugar, eggs, and vanilla in a bowl with an electric mixer until smooth. Spread over hot baked crust. Return to oven and bake for 15 more minutes.
5. Spread cherry pie filling over the cheese layer.
6. Combine reserved coarsely chopped nuts and reserved crumbs. Sprinkle evenly over cherries. Return to oven and bake for another 15 minutes. Cool. Refrigerate several hours. Cut into bars, about 2 x 1 1/2 inches.
